commands: Get-Process ExperimentPrototypeB03230 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet, Responding | Format-List
Get-Process dcvserver,dcvagent,dcv* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, CPU, WorkingSet | Format-Table -AutoSize
if (Test-Path $dcvConf) { Get-Content $dcvConf | Select-String -Pattern 'quic|resolution|frame|quality|display' } else { Write-Output 'dcv.conf not found' }
Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | Select-Object Name, AdapterRAM, VideoModeDescription | Format-List
